The '''Interior Region''' was a quadrant in the middle of the [[Hapes Cluster/Legends|Hapes Cluster]]<ref name="TEA" /> and was of a medium size. In total, it contained twenty-three inhabited [[Star system/Legends|star systems]] one of which was [[Hapes system/Legends|Hapes]] itself.

==History==
Around c.[[4050 BBY]], the Interior Region was used as a base for the [[Lorell Raiders]] and later on it became the foremost quadrant that the first [[Queen Mother]] vanquished.<ref name="TEA" />

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] {{Nc}}
